name: Bravern Ventures Ltd.
summary: Bravern Ventures Ltd. is in the process of liquidation of its remaining assets. Previously, it was engaged in harvesting hardwood timber through a timber license in Colombia. The company was formerly known as Prima Colombia Hardwood Inc. and changed its name to Bravern Ventures Ltd. in January 2015. Bravern Ventures Ltd. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
